impacts.statement: Highway 61 north of Vicksburg is flooded.
Road is inundated at the intersection of Levee Street, North Washington Street, and First East Street.
Most of Hutson Street in Vicksburg is inundated.
In Vicksburg, most streets west of Hutson Street are flooded.
Water reaches the south end of Hutson Street. Hall Road at Cedars Road is closed and several businesses on Highway 61 South are flooded in the Vicksburg area.
In Vicksburg, the west side of Thompson Lake Road up to the railroad is inundated.
The river reaches Hall Road at Cedars Road and the edge of Cedars School Circle on the west side in Vicksburg. Vicksburg Floodwall gate at China Street is closed.
Vicksburg Floodwall Gate at Clay Street is closed.
LeTourneau Technologies experiences flooding problems. Vicksburg Floodwall gate number 7 at the lumber yard is closed.
Portions of Highway 465, Eagle Lake Road and several houses are underwater. Portions of Letourneau Road in South Vicksburg are flooded.
Water level reaches the grain bins at the Bunge Grain facility.
Vicksburg Floodwall Gate at South Street is closed.
Ford and Kings Subdivision at Williams Street begin to flood.
Residence on Williams Street in Vicksburg begins to flood.
Ford and Kings Subdivision at Pittman Road and Mary's Alley begins to flood.
Long Lake Subdivision is completely flooded. Vicksburg Floodwall gates at train depot and the lumber yard gate 8 are closed.
Jackson Lane in North Vicksburg begins to flood.
Bunge Grain facility near St. Joseph Louisiana ceases loading operations. Chickasaw Road is going under water just west of the Chickasaw Community.
Water reaches the slab of the first structure in the Chickasaw Bayou Subdivision.

Long Lake Road is under water starting where the low road to the island takes off south. Access to Long Lake Community requires a boat. Chickasaw Road goes under water just west of the Chickasaw Community.
The storm water drain valves are closed at the flood gates along the Vicksburg Water Front.
Shady Lane Drive becomes impassable. Long Lake Road becomes impassable just north of Cypress Drive.
The Long Lake Road to Eagle Lake Road becomes impassable about 1 mile north of the Long Lake Community.
The Vicksburg FloodWall Gate at Crawford street is closed.
Water begins to affect the Long Lake Community. The low road to Kings Island becomes impassable.

dataAttribution.title: Observations courtesy of U.S. Army Corps of Engineers

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 48 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
